events.name: Mingtiandi Singapore Forum 2026
events.attendeeProfile: C-level executives from pension funds, insurers, SWFs, investment managers; 270+ guests
events.suitabilityNotes: Core target audience for APAC real estate deals. HKL CEO Michael Smith speaking - relevant to your Michelle Ling relationship.
events.notes: Early bird deadline April 3. Michael Smith (HKL CEO) speaking - Michelle Ling may attend.

events.name: Mingtiandi APAC Logistics Forum 2026
events.suitabilityNotes: FREE and highly relevant for industrial/logistics deals. 5 sessions covering Japan, Korea, China, Australia, emerging markets.
events.notes: Virtual - low commitment, high value for logistics intel

events.name: Mingtiandi APAC Data Centre Forum 2026
events.suitabilityNotes: Only relevant if pivoting into data centre space. Free but niche sector.
events.notes: Skip unless you have DC deals

events.name: ULI Asia Pacific Summit 2026
events.attendeeProfile: 600+ attendees from 15+ countries; developers, investors, urbanists
speakers: Tim Wang (GLP Capital Partners) - 2026 Programme Chair
events.suitabilityNotes: Prestigious cross-sector event. China location may be friction for some. AI + real estate focus.
events.notes: 12 study tours, ULI Asia Pacific Awards

events.name: Prestel & Partner Family Office Forum Singapore 2026
events.attendeeProfile: 100+ single family offices and private wealth holders
events.suitabilityNotes: TOP PRIORITY. Free for qualified FOs ($150M AUM). Direct principal access. April timing - before UK trip ideal for Becca.
events.notes: Contact ticket@prestelandpartner.com. FREE for qualifying family offices. PRIORITY EVENT.

events.name: World Family Office Forum Asia 2026
events.attendeeProfile: SFOs, UHNW families, wealth principals. Previous attendees: GP Group, Globaltec Capital, NF Trinity, Medway Investments
events.suitabilityNotes: Elite family office event. Requires qualification - contact info@connectgroup.global. Hong Kong location.
events.notes: Supported by HK Financial Services Development Council. Board approval required.

events.name: WMI Global-Asia Family Office Summit 2026
events.attendeeProfile: 600+ participants including global family offices, investors, ecosystem partners
events.suitabilityNotes: Backed by MAS and EDB. High quality Singapore government engagement. 2-day summit with Owner's Symposium + Partners Forum.
events.notes: 2025 dates were Sep 29-30. SFA funding available for eligible participants.

events.name: Campden Wealth Asia-Pacific Family Office Investment Forum 2026
events.attendeeProfile: Qualifying family offices, family businesses, UHNWs
events.suitabilityNotes: Campden Club membership required. Theme: 'The New Dynasty: Family Offices Shaping Asia's Investment Future'. Contacts: Janice Tham (members), Livi Septiani (non-members).
events.notes: Qualification process required. Contact Campden Wealth directly.

scoringCriteria.description: Events scored 1-10 based on the following factors

factors.name: Investor Concentration
factors.description: Density of actual investors/allocators vs. service providers

factors.name: Target Profile Match
factors.description: How well attendees match your ideal investor profile

factors.name: Decision-Maker Access
factors.description: Are attendees principals/CIOs or junior staff?

priorityActions.action: Register Becca as FO for FREE admission
